creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: yuri
Date: Sat Feb 24 09:05:58 UTC 2018
New revision: 462780
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/462780

Log:
  net/remotebox: Update to 2.4

  freebsd_ports@k-worx.org takes maintainership

  Additional port changes:
  * Changed to DISTVERSION
  * Added LICENSE_FILE, removed LICENSE_FILE_GPLv2
  * Removed net/rdesktop dependency from RUN_DEPENDS (converted to option)
  * Added NO_ARCH
  * Added options DOCS,FREERDP,RDESKTOP and corresponding dependencies

  PR:		225468
  Submitted by:	owk <freebsd_ports@k-worx.org>
  Approved by:	portmgr (maintainer timeout, 14 days)
  Approved by:	tcberner (mentor, implicit)

Changes:
  head/net/remotebox/Makefile
  head/net/remotebox/distinfo
  head/net/remotebox/pkg-plist
